matched.name: Fluid X
matched.description: Fluid X is a mesh chair designed for posture support and comfort. Integrated lumbar support helps maintain a steadier seated posture.

features: Designed for seamless support. Comfort that flows with every move
specs.dimensions: Overall height (including headrest): 1300 mm; Seat height (from floor): 450 mm; Headrest height: 170 mm; Armrest width: 250 mm.; Headrest width: 280 mm.; Overall height: 1020 mm; Seat headrest width : 420 mm; Overall width (base including wheels): 660 mm; Seat width: 500 mm.; Armrest width: 100 mm.

overview_sections.heading: Designed for seamless support. Comfort that flows with every move
overview_sections.body: Fluid X is built for those who need their chair to keep up. With smooth adjustability and responsive features, it follows your posture—not the other way around—offering comfort that adapts with you from the first task to the last
From neck to lower back, Fluid X adapts to your body’s shape and movement—minimizing tension so your mind stays sharp
Shift the armrests to match your ideal working angle—offering relief for your arms and better alignment for your upper body
The backrest includes targeted lumbar reinforcement that adapts to your spine’s curve, reducing pressure and improving seated posture

specs.warranty_text: Backed by our comprehensive upto 10 year warranty, ensuring lasting quality and peace of mind with every purchase.
specs.sustainability_text: Crafted with eco-friendly materials and sustainable practices to minimize environmental impact while maximizing durability.
